sentences.translationEn: The child begins learning Arabic letters.

sentences.arabic: اللُّغَةُ العَرَبِيَّةُ لَهَا ثَمَانِيَةٌ وَعِشْرُونَ حَرْفًا.
sentences.translation: Arapski jezik ima dvadeset i osam slova.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabic language has twenty-eight letters.
The child writes the letters in the notebook.
The teacher encourages and rewards him.
